target.title: fix(update): continue after package doctor warnings
target.body:
## Summary

- Downgrade completed nonzero package post-install `openclaw doctor --fix` results to an advisory update step after the package install has already been verified.
- Keep killed/timed-out doctor runs fatal so interrupted repairs do not continue into plugin convergence or gateway restart.
- Surface advisory doctor stderr in both live progress and printed update summaries, then continue into the fresh post-core update process.
- Fix the progress renderer typings for advisory doctor summary rows so the PR head passes the prod/test type gates.

## Verification

- `pnpm format:fix src/cli/update-cli/progress.ts src/cli/update-cli/update-command.ts src/cli/update-cli.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm tsgo:prod`
- `pnpm check:test-types`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cli/update-cli.test.ts`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` (clean: no accepted/actionable findings)
- Real package update proof from a packed branch tarball with a Node preload hook that forces only the post-install `doctor` child to exit nonzero while `OPENCLAW_UPDATE_IN_PROGRESS=1` is set.


## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: The `openclaw update` CLI package path continues past post-install doctor only for the dedicated exit code, a normally terminated child, and a valid typed deferred-configured-plugin-repair advisory, then runs mandatory post-core plugin convergence before restart. The non-converging generic `runGatewayUpdate` path keeps post-install doctor nonzero results blocking and does not participate in the advisory IPC contract.

Real environment tested: The prior packed-package macOS update proof remains from ancestor head 377924d03129cc97b094c1d2681148e37487e5f0. Current head 408dcbeeee8949cf4125c495d010bf1f046fecda was tested in the isolated macOS PR worktree with Node 24.14.0 against upstream/main 4809ac70fa5aadded1a9e28e904eb35c266ebb1c.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```sh
env -u OPENCLAW_SERVICE_KIND -u OPENCLAW_SERVICE_MARKER -u OPENCLAW_SERVICE_VERSION -u OPENCLAW_SERVICE_MANAGED_ENV_KEYS -u OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_SERVICE_PID -u OPENCLAW_LAUNCHD_LABEL -u OPENCLAW_SYSTEMD_UNIT -u OPENCLAW_WINDOWS_TASK_NAME -u OPENCLAW_WRAPPER PATH=/Users/jason/.nvm/versions/node/v24.14.0/bin:$PATH OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=2 OPENCLAW_VITEST_FS_MODULE_CACHE_PATH=/tmp/openclaw-pr-91586-vitest-fix2-20260613T0005 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/update-runner.test.ts src/cli/update-cli.test.ts src/infra/package-update-steps.test.ts src/commands/doctor/shared/release-configured-plugin-installs.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/update.test.ts
git diff --check upstream/main...HEAD
git merge-tree --write-tree upstream/main HEAD
.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base upstream/main --codex-bin /Users/jason/.codex/openclaw-pr-autopilot/bin/codex-persist-sessions --model codex=kepler-alpha --thinking codex=high
```

Evidence after fix: The focused suite passed 291 tests across five Vitest shards, including the CLI advisory continuation path, shared advisory classifier, configured-plugin doctor flow, generic update runner, and gateway error/no-restart contract. `git diff --check` was clean. The current-main merge simulation was conflict-free and produced tree 42874f22bd78022574677a46e82eedca289c354b. Fresh persisted branch Kepler autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings and judged the patch correct.

Copied live output excerpt from the real packed-package updater run on ancestor 377924d03129cc97b094c1d2681148e37487e5f0:

```json
{
  "status": "ok",
  "mode": "npm",
  "doctor": {
    "name": "openclaw doctor",
    "exitCode": 86,
    "advisory": { "kind": "package-post-install-doctor" },
    "stderrTail": "Skipped package-manager repair for configured plugin discord during package update; rerun openclaw doctor --fix after the update completes."
  },
  "postUpdatePluginsStatus": "warning"
}
```

Observed result after fix: The typed advisory gate authorizes only the intended recoverable doctor result in the CLI package updater, which continues into guaranteed post-core plugin convergence. Unknown exits, missing or malformed results, killed runs, signals, and timeouts remain blocking. The generic update runner's advisory/deferral additions and their tests were removed, restoring its existing blocking doctor contract instead of allowing it to report success without convergence.

What was not tested: Current head did not rerun the packed-package real update, a managed gateway restart, production/test type checks, or a broad Testbox lane. The prior real package success proof remains attributable to ancestor 377924d03129cc97b094c1d2681148e37487e5f0. No Crabbox or Mantis lane was run, and no live or protected channel was touched.
target.author: fuller-stack-dev
